How some were disciple, told us that he spent thirty-five years as a solitary fasting eliminated by raging fire whilst others were slowly roasted. How two days <before he ate> and keeping completely silent, speaking some were drowned in rivers, others at sea. How some were torn to nobody. If he said anytliing at all, he did it by signs. I saw this apart by camivorous beasts like criminals whilst otbers were fed to man myself in the Lavra of the Aliotes mentioned above, for I birds of prey after suffering exquisite tortures.
